debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

failed_attempts:
simp [Cs.eval]
  have h₂ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval ≠ 0 := by
    have h₃ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval = (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval := by
      simp [Exp.eval]
    rw [h₃]
    have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := h₁
    rw [h₄]
    intro h₅
    apply h
    simp_all
  simp [h₂]
  <;>
  aesop

simp_all [bits2num, bits2num_e, denotation.n, if_neg]
  <;>
  (try
    simp_all [sub_eq_zero]) <;>
  (try
    {
      intro h₂
      apply h
      simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          exfalso
          apply h
          <;>
          simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
        })
    })

intro h₁
      have h₂ : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval = 0 := by
        simpa [Exp.sub, Exp.eval] using h₁
      have h₃ : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by
        -- Use the fact that the difference is zero to conclude that the evaluations are equal.
        have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval = 0 := h₂
        have h₅ : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval = 0 := h₄
        simp [sub_eq_zero] at h₅ ⊢
        <;> simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
        <;> omega
      have h₄ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
        -- Prove that the evaluation of bits2num_e is equal to bits2num.
        have h₅ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
          simp [bits2num_e, ared.bits2num, Exp.eval]
          <;>
          (try rfl) <;>
          (try simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
          (try ring_nf) <;>
          (try omega)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              induction args with
              | nil => simp [bits2num]
              | cons x xs ih =>
                simp_all [bits2num, Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]
                <;>
                (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all)
                <;>
                (try omega)
            })
        exact h₅
      have h₅ : e.eval = bits2num args := by
        linarith
      exact h (by simp_all)
    -- Use the fact that the evaluation of the expression is not zero to conclude that the if condition is false.
    simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₁ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
          simp [bits2num_e, ared.bits2num, Exp.eval]
          <;>
          (try rfl) <;>
          (try simp_all [Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
          (try ring_nf) <;>
          (try omega)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              induction args with
              | nil => simp [bits2num]
              | cons x xs ih =>
                simp_all [bits2num, Vector.foldl, ZMod.nat_cast_self]
                <;>
                (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all)
                <;>
                (try omega)
            })
        simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
  })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
      <;>
      (try omega)
    })

have h₁ : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    have h₂ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      simp [bits2num_e]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try simp_all [Vector.foldl]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try aesop)
    rw [h₂]
    intro h₃
    apply h
    have h₄ : bits2num args - e.eval = 0 := by simpa using h₃
    have h₅ : bits2num args = e.eval := by
      have h₆ : bits2num args - e.eval = 0 := h₄
      have h₇ : bits2num args - e.eval = 0 := h₆
      simp [sub_eq_zero] at h₇ ⊢
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
      <;>
      aesop
    simp_all [sub_eq_zero]
    <;>
    aesop
  split_ifs
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try simp_all [sub_eq_zero]) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]) <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try aesop)

simp [Cs.eval, h₁]
  <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Exp.eval, bits2num_e, bits2num]
      <;>
      omega
    })

simp [Cs.eval, h₁, sub_eq_zero, h]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [denotation]
      <;>
      omega
    })
